placeholders.description: Brief description of the team purpose
placeholders.prompt: Instructions for the team lead during provisioning...

solo.description: Only the team lead (main process) will be started - no teammates will be spawned. Works like a regular agent session in your chosen runtime (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Gemini) but with access to the task board for planning. Saves tokens by avoiding teammate coordination overhead. You can add members later from the team settings.
solo.label: Solo team

errors.changesSavedRefreshFailed: Team changes were saved, but failed to refresh the latest view: {{message}}
errors.liveRenameBlocked: Existing teammates cannot be renamed while the team is live. renamed: {{names}}
errors.memberNameInvalid: Member name must start with alphanumeric, use only [a-zA-Z0-9._-], max 128 chars
errors.memberNameNumericSuffix: Member name "{{name}}" is not allowed (reserved for Claude CLI auto-suffix). Use "{{base}}" instead.
errors.memberNamesUnique: Member names must be unique before saving
errors.newLiveTeammates: Add new teammates from the dedicated Add member dialog while the team is live. Edit Team only supports updating existing teammates.
errors.provisioning: Team settings cannot be edited while provisioning is still in progress. Wait for launch to finish, then try again.
errors.restartFailedMany: Team saved, but failed to restart these teammates: {{failures}}
errors.restartFailedOne: Team saved, but failed to restart this teammate: {{failures}}
errors.settingsChanged: Team settings changed while this dialog was open. Reopen it and review the latest state before saving.
errors.settingsSavedMembersAndRefreshFailed: Team settings were saved, but member changes failed: {{message}}. Refresh also failed: {{refreshError}}
errors.settingsSavedMembersFailed: Team settings were saved, but member changes failed: {{message}}
errors.settingsSavedRefreshFailed: Team settings were saved, but failed to refresh the latest view: {{message}}
errors.unsupportedMixedPrimaryMutation: Live edits to primary-owned teammates in mixed OpenCode teams are not supported yet. Stop the team, edit the roster, then relaunch. Affected: {{names}}

editTeam.memberRestartWarning: Saving will restart this teammate to apply role, workflow, worktree isolation, provider, model, effort, or MCP access changes.

notices.liveRenameBlocked: Live save is blocked because existing teammates were renamed. Revert those identity changes or stop the team first.
notices.newLiveTeammates: New teammates cannot be added from Edit Team while the team is live. Use the Add member dialog instead.
notices.provisioning: Team provisioning is still in progress. Editing is temporarily locked until launch finishes.
notices.restartMany: Saving will restart or relaunch these teammates to apply role, workflow, worktree isolation, provider, model, effort, or MCP access changes: {{names}}.
notices.restartOne: Saving will restart or relaunch this teammate to apply role, workflow, worktree isolation, provider, model, effort, or MCP access changes: {{names}}.
notices.unsupportedMixedPrimaryMutation: Live edits/removals for primary-owned teammates in mixed OpenCode teams require stopping and relaunching the team: {{names}}.

actions.discardTooltip: Discard all edits for this file
actions.restoreTooltip: Create/restore this file on disk from the preview

contentUnavailable.description: The ledger recorded metadata for this change, but full text content is not available. This usually means binary, large, or hash-only content.
contentUnavailable.safety: Automatic accept/reject is disabled for this file to avoid unsafe disk writes.
contentUnavailable.title: Text content is unavailable

disabled.acceptRejectContentUnavailable: Accept/Reject is disabled because full text content is unavailable.
disabled.acceptRejectMissingOnDisk: Accept/Reject is disabled while the file is missing on disk.
disabled.rejectBaselineUnavailable: Reject is disabled because the original baseline is unavailable.
disabled.rejectContentUnavailable: Reject is disabled because full text content is unavailable.
disabled.rejectManualLedgerReview: Reject is disabled because this ledger change has binary, large, or unavailable content.

missingOnDisk.description: We can still show a preview from agent logs, but your filesystem is out of sync.
missingOnDisk.restoreSuffix: to write the preview content back to disk.
missingOnDisk.restoreUnavailable: Full file content is not available to restore automatically.
missingOnDisk.title: File is missing on disk

tooltips.autoOn: Auto-mark files as viewed when scrolled to end (ON)
tooltips.autoOff: Auto-mark files as viewed when scrolled to end (OFF)
tooltips.acceptAll: Accept all changes across all files
tooltips.rejectAll: Reject all safely rejectable changes across all files
tooltips.rejectAllDisabled: No pending files have a safe original baseline to reject.
tooltips.applyRejections: Apply rejected hunks to disk; accepted changes are kept as-is

diffError.title: Failed to render diff view
diffError.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred while rendering the diff.

conflict.title: Conflict Detected
conflict.description: This file has been modified since the agent's changes

fullDiffLoading.subtitleForFile: Finalizing the exact editor diff for {{file}}.
fullDiffLoading.subtitleCurrentFile: Finalizing the exact editor diff for the current file.
fullDiffLoading.subtitleMany: Resolving exact before/after baselines for the files currently loading.
fullDiffLoading.progressDescription: {{ready}} ready, {{loading}} still loading. Preview diffs stay visible below while the remaining baselines are resolved.
fullDiffLoading.singleDescription: Preview diffs stay visible below while the exact baseline is resolved.

review.fileMissingPrefix: File is missing on disk. This diff may be only a preview from agent logs. Use
review.fileMissingSuffix: to create the file on disk.

filePlaceholder.description: Preparing a full editor diff for this file.

exact.title: Task scope determined precisely
exact.detail: Both start and completion markers found in the session log. The diff includes only changes made during this specific task - other tasks that modified the same files are excluded.

endEstimated.title: End boundary estimated
endEstimated.detail: Only the start marker was found - the task has no completion marker yet. Changes shown from task start to end of session. If other tasks ran after this one in the same session, their changes may also be included.

startEstimated.title: Start boundary estimated
startEstimated.detail: Only the completion marker was found - the start of work was not captured. If other tasks ran before this one in the same session, their changes to the same files may also be included.

allSession.title: Showing all session changes
allSession.detail: No task markers found in the session log. Cannot isolate this task - all file changes from the entire session are shown, including changes from other tasks. This can happen with older CLI versions or non-standard workflows.

exact.title: Changes captured by task ledger
exact.detail: The orchestrator captured these file changes while the agent was working on this task.

limited.title: Changes captured with limited reviewability
limited.detail: The orchestrator captured these file changes for this task, but at least one change was captured from a snapshot or metadata-only source. Review exact text diffs where available; binary or unavailable content may require manual review.

workInterval.title: Scoped by persisted work interval
workInterval.detail: The task start marker was not available in the session log, so the diff is scoped by the task work interval stored on the board.

empty.noSafeDiffDescription: The task ledger did not expose a safe file diff for this task.
empty.noSafeDiffDiagnosticsDescription: The task ledger did not expose a safe file diff for this task. The diagnostics below explain why.
empty.noFileEventsYet: The task ledger has no file events for this task yet.
empty.noFileEvents: The task ledger has no file events for this task.

openCodeContextConfigHint.summary: OpenCode local models can use an OpenCode context budget instead of prompt-only limits.
openCodeContextConfigHint.description: Add matching limits to the OpenCode config for the provider and model used by this teammate. This helps OpenCode compact and prune before local models overflow their context window.
openCodeContextConfigHint.replaceSuffix: with the provider and model IDs from your OpenCode setup. Prompt instructions like
openCodeContextConfigHint.promptInstructionsSuffix: are weaker because the request is assembled before the model reads them.

sessions.provisioningHint: Sessions will appear after team provisioning

detailSummary.openCodeNoOutput: OpenCode runtime check returned no output
detailSummary.cliBinaryCouldNotStart: CLI binary could not be started

providerStatus.deepVerificationPending: Deep verification is still running. OpenCode free models may take around 20 seconds.

failureHints.openCodeAccessDenied: Fix folder permissions or move the project to a user-writable folder. Running as administrator is only a temporary workaround.
failureHints.openCodeBridgeNoOutput: Restart the app and OpenCode runtime, then retry. If it repeats, copy diagnostics.
failureHints.workingDirectoryMissing: Choose an existing working directory, then reopen this dialog.
failureHints.authenticationRequired: Authenticate the required provider in Claude CLI, then reopen this dialog.
failureHints.runtimeProviderNotConfigured: Configure the selected provider runtime, then reopen this dialog.
failureHints.openCodeRuntimeMissing: Install or retry OpenCode runtime from the provider status card, then reopen this dialog.
failureHints.openCodeAppMcpUnreachable: Retry launch to refresh the OpenCode app MCP bridge. If it repeats, restart the app and OpenCode runtime.
failureHints.cliBinaryMissing: Make sure the local Claude CLI binary exists and can be started, then reopen this dialog.
failureHints.default: Resolve the issue above, then reopen this dialog.
